summary: Manual current-pointer retire review approved GH-105 retire content head f39a7bbcdc5d53afc56e38b5dc7d93a0b8bfa3c2. This review covers only retiring the GH-105 current pointer to no_active_item / idle after PR #162 merged.
reviewed_validation_summary: Post-merge closeout consumed implementation PR #161 (https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/pull/161), PR head `00ce8908aca27fe628b62b4c62fd4b4e86900076`, squash merge commit `c72e38619416454926fcc21380025d9c5edf7416`, target branch `main`, hosted run https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/actions/runs/28642506523, and issue closeout evidence for #105, #106, #107, #108, #109, and #94. Pre-merge validation passed `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, review read for `.loom/reviews/GH-105.json` and `.loom/reviews/GH-105.spec.json`, and PR metadata preflight. Hosted `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `repo-local-cli`, `loom-check`, and `loom-pr-merge-gate` passed on run `28642506523`. Local `loom build`, `loom review run`, `loom pr gate`, and `loom merge-ready` remain blocked by Loom suite CLI JSON consumption; no repo-local Loom shim was added.
follow_ups: #110-#113 and #95 remain open for the next batch; GH-105 retire does not start them.
Fix the Loom review-record / suite CLI JSON consumption surface outside this App retire PR.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The retire diff is limited to the current pointer idle carrier and bootstrap fact-chain mode. It does not change App product/UI/docs behavior or alter GH-105 implementation/closeout evidence.

carrier_only_closeout_review.reason: Authored closeout review approved only terminal GH-105 current-pointer retire metadata for PR #163.

consumed_inputs.retire_scope: Only .loom/status/current.md and .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json retire GH-105 to no_active_item / idle.
consumed_inputs.known_tool_blocker: loom build / review run / local pr gate / local merge-ready suite CLI JSON consumption remains outside this App PR; no repo-local tools/loom.py added
